message:
feat(workflows): add account selection step for failover

New workflow step for intelligent account selection during failover:

- AccountSelectionStepResult: contains selected account and explanation
- AccountSelectionStepError: caut and storage error variants
- refresh_and_select_account(): orchestrates the full flow:
  1. Refresh usage from caut CLI
  2. Update accounts mirror in DB
  3. Select best account per configured policy

Note: Does NOT update last_used_at - that only happens after
successful failover to avoid counting failed attempts.

This enables automated account rotation when hitting usage limits.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
